segments.text: Well, Donkey Kong's vertical recovery is pretty limited, so...
segments.original_text: ちょっとねドンキーコング縦方向への復帰は乏しいので

segments.text: he couldn't make it back to the stage!
segments.original_text: ステージ上には戻ってこれなかった

full_text: Well, Donkey Kong's vertical recovery is pretty limited, so... he couldn't make it back to the stage!
